coreResponsibility.summary: A Kaltura Player plugin that enables end-users to report inappropriate video content by submitting moderation flags with categorized violation types and optional comments to the Kaltura backend.

featureOwnership: Moderation flag submission to Kaltura API
Categorized violation type selection (Sexual Content, Violent/Repulsive, Harmful/Dangerous, Spam, Copyright, Terms of Use Violation)
Player pause/resume during report submission flow

managedStates: Player playback state during moderation flow

externalAPIs.name: Kaltura baseentry.flag API
externalAPIs.description: Submits moderation flags for video entries

coreFiles: src/moderation-plugin.tsx - Main plugin class extending BasePlugin
src/providers/report-loader.ts - Kaltura API request builder for flag submission

dispatched.name: report_clicked
dispatched.description: Fired when user opens the moderation report overlay

dispatched.name: report_submitted
dispatched.description: Fired when user submits a moderation report, includes reportType in payload

configOptions.name: reportLength
configOptions.description: Maximum character length for report description

configOptions.name: subtitle
configOptions.description: Optional extra information displayed in the report overlay

configOptions.name: notificatonDuration
configOptions.description: Duration in milliseconds for toast notifications

configOptions.name: moderateOptions
configOptions.default: [Sexual Content, Violent Or Repulsive, Harmful Or Dangerous Act, Spam / Commercials]
configOptions.description: Configurable list of violation types for reporting
